rules: titles and body copy TYPE ON with a visible cursor — the house signature (reversed 2026-07-17 to match the approved reference film and the design system; the old rule said 'no letter-spin / typewriter on text' and was wrong). Decorative letter loops (spin/bounce/pulse) stay banned.
no spins on content (orbit rings excepted)
alert is the only non-blue beat

wave band loops the whole frame as the through-line — and is MANDATORY in every frame (the 'intentionally waveless' rule was retired 2026-07-17). It is hoisted to src/scenes/WorldLayer.tsx and rendered once behind all scenes, so the water never breaks at a cut.
